parents.subject: LU-15388 osd-ldiskfs: wrong dot/dotdot FID for local agent

commit.subject: LU-18356 tests: fix skipping symbolic version code
commit.message:
LU-18356 tests: fix skipping symbolic version code

Allow the except/*.ex file to exclude a subtest based on the symbolic
version code (e.g. "CLIENT_VERSION"), rather than the numeric version.
The symbolic version needs to be evaluated in order to work correctly.

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/60194
Lustre-commit: d16a9f9451a03fc12caaa1aaae13867362166a9a

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: c4c3a7350b ("LU-18356 tests: allow server to specify except list")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Id27bd86ce295b2ad3fda041baa776a72442540e5
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Frederick Dilger <fdilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61363
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
